sections.paragraph: ἐλεέω [s. ἔλεος] ‘show concern for one who is in a bad situation or condition’, have compassion, show mercy, pity Mt 5:7; Mk 5:19; Lk 16:24; Ro 9:15; Phil 2:27; 1 Pt 2:10; Jd 22f v.l.—1 Cor 7:25; 2 Cor 4:1; 1 Ti 1:13, 16 relate to Paul mercifully given an additional chance for service to God.—With focus on an act of kindness Ro 12:8.
